title: Fix missing L2 callback for routing priority/SCHC, now_ms timing, and PoE Kconfig deps
description: Research via explore subagent: L2 callback in lichen_l2.c, RPL TX priority/SCHC in rpl/gateway, forward_mesh_to_upstream in gateway app, now_ms timing, Kconfig for PoE in thinknode_m7. Fixes: missing callback for routing priority/SCHC; replace hardcoded now_ms=0 with k_uptime_get_32(); add PoE Kconfig deps on regulator/ADC per power subsys. Mimic patterns, no dead code/comments, follow init order. Run west build -b native_sim + tests, 3 codereview passes (human beads if ambiguous), close all when clean. Parallelize research/edits.
